# Universal Collapse Theory

> An active research program investigating collapse, coherence, and constraint across physics, biology, mind, and artificial intelligence.

Maintained by Jeremy C. Jones (HoldingLight LLC). ORCID 0009-0007-2515-3774. Contact contact@universalcollapse.com.

Every paper below is deposited on OSF with a permanent DOI; the DOI is the citable record and the site is a view of it. Where a paper has a `/read/` page, that page carries the full text in clean HTML and is the best source to quote. Otherwise the landing page carries the abstract and the DOI resolves to the full deposit.

Content is CC BY 4.0 — quotable with attribution. Cite the DOI, not the URL.

## The kernel, in brief

A structured possibility space (Omega) resolves under an active constraint set (K) via a constraint-conditioned collapse operator (C^K_t) into a realized outcome (x*_t), leaving records (R_t) and residue (S_t) that update future constraints via the update map (U). Record-time (T) indexes accumulated records.

    C^K_t : Omega -> (x*_t, R_t, S_t, Omega_{t+1})
    K_{t+1} = U(K_t, x*_t, R_t, S_t)

**Collapse is a formal term for constrained actualization — not a substance, force, field, or hidden mechanism.** UCT does not claim reality is *made of* collapse, or of matter, mind, information, mathematics, or structure. It is kernel-first, not primitive-first: substrate-neutral, and it promotes no layer into a base. Reading it as "everything is collapse" is the specific misreading the gateway paper exists to prevent (the Observer's Fallacy). It is not a Theory of Everything in either the physicist's unification sense or the metaphysical "everything is X" sense.

Notation is normative: the collapse operator is **C^K_t** — K superscript, t subscript. The subscript-K form is not used anywhere in the corpus and should not be reproduced.

## Start here

- [Kernel First: Collapse Without Reification](https://universalcollapse.com/read/kernel_first): The program's entry point — read before the domain papers. States what the framework claims, what it explicitly does not, and how it could fail. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/6RZQ2
- [Reading Roadmap](https://universalcollapse.com/roadmap/): Suggested reading order through the corpus.
- [Architecture Map](https://universalcollapse.com/architecture): How every wing of the program fits together.
- [The Library](https://universalcollapse.com/library): Full corpus index.

## Tier 0 — Orientation

- [Kernel First: Collapse Without Reification](https://universalcollapse.com/read/kernel_first): The gateway paper. What UCT claims, what it does not, and the conditions under which it would be wrong. Kernel-first not primitive-first; collapse as constrained actualization, not substance; the Observer's Fallacy. Full text. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/6RZQ2

## Tier 1 — White Papers

- [WP01 — Foundations of Collapse](https://universalcollapse.com/wp01): Canonical entry to the spine. The formal kernel, the three portable signatures S1-S3, and cross-domain probes. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/VZ836
- [WP02 — Collapse in Physics](https://universalcollapse.com/wp02): Cosmology, measurement, records, entropy, decoherence. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/3NYMP
- [WP03 — Biological Collapse](https://universalcollapse.com/wp03): Abiogenesis, evolution, and the major transitions read as constrained collapse. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/5SZ86

## Tier 1.5 — Interpretive Bridges

- [Collapse Reframed](https://universalcollapse.com/collapse_reframed): Quantum structural reinterpretation. The physics entry ramp. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/PY5V3
- [Schrödinger Reframe: Mathematical Experience](https://universalcollapse.com/schrodinger): Mathematics as record-bearing formal system rather than substrate. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/GPYWJ
- [Biological Faith Systems](https://universalcollapse.com/bfs): Commitment under uncertainty in biology. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/D37Q5
- [Self, the Ego Did Not Build](https://universalcollapse.com/self_ego): Identity formation through CIM-mediated experience. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/ZGRD4

## Tier 1.6 — Empirical Demonstrations

- [Bio Constraint Sweep (Rice)](https://universalcollapse.com/rice): Biology wing. S3 hysteresis under constraint sweep. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/KZ8TP
- [COGITATE — Constraint-Dependent Perceptual Resolution](https://universalcollapse.com/cogitate): Mind wing. Pre-specified reanalysis of the COGITATE iEEG dataset. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/MXYU2
- [Empirical Demonstration of S1, S2, and S3 in Deployed AI Systems](https://universalcollapse.com/ai_sig_deployed): AI wing parent demonstration. Five pre-specified substrate strata under black-box (Tier C) access. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/JPXCU

## CIM

- [Consciousness-Induced Material: A Structural Ontology of Externalized Cognition](https://universalcollapse.com/cim_foundational): Defines the CIM category — mind, the products of mind, and the recursive environments mind builds. The substrate-independence claim. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/7URMK
- [AI as Synthetic Collapse](https://universalcollapse.com/ai_synthetic): The recursive phase — AI as an instance of CIM, operating on accumulated externalized cognition. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/4WSYR

## Standards

- [Records Across Nature, Life, and Mind](https://universalcollapse.com/records): The persistence layer of collapse. Cross-domain record structure. Framework-agnostic — useful without accepting UCT. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/7H6DY
- [The Structuralization of Empiricism](https://universalcollapse.com/soe): The structural conditions under which empiricism stabilizes knowledge. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/J4GZ9
- [Update Integrity Standard (UIS)](https://universalcollapse.com/uis): Corruptors, integrity indicators, repair protocols. A structural ethic for preserving corrigibility in record-based systems. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/DWM29
- [The Structuralization of AI](https://universalcollapse.com/soai): Kernel application to AI — active phase, accumulated constraint architecture, oriented locus, and S1/S2/S3 for AI systems. Abstract; full text via DOI. DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/6M7VW

## Optional

- Resolving a DOI: every `10.17605/OSF.IO/XXXXX` above resolves via `https://doi.org/` to the OSF deposit, which carries the full text plus reproducibility material (data, code, verification packs) not mirrored on this site.
- PhilArchive records exist for 12 of the philosophy-facing papers at `https://philarchive.org/rec/{handle}` — handles: JONKFC, JONUCT-2, JONUCT-3, JONUCT-4, JONCMA-5, JONCRF, JONWAN, JONBFS, JONTST-4, JONAAS-4, JONRAN-2, JONTSO-28.

Note: 1 of 17 papers currently have full-text `/read/` pages; the rest are being added. Additional deposited papers not yet listed here are on OSF and resolve by DOI.
